meaning: n.大小,体积,大批,大多数,散装vt.显得大,显得重要,
examples: The bulk of the population lives in cities.
Heterosexual contact is responsible for the bulk of HIV transmission.
It's cheaper to buy in bulk.
The bulk of the work will center on setting the various standards, contends Scardamalia.
Paulson told reporters the administration hoped to target the bulk of the relief to consumers.
